title: OreoClient
description: a 'client' for minecraft. Not much. Its what you would expect from a hacked client, but on a datapack so you cant abuse anything on it. server side only.
body:
Per Section 3 of Modrinth's Content Rules - This is just a datapack, therefore its not client side and can only be used if the server host allows the datapack.

# OreoClient
_"a so called minecraft 'client'"_

## Description

This datapack acts as a hacked client, but for server side, as datapacks cannot be accessed client side unless the server has the datapack enabled. OreoClient was just a little dumb thing I made from boredom. Not much currently, I am working on updates for it though, so yeah.

## Usage

To use the datapack, you can access its menu by pressing your quick actions key (default: G) or access the button from the pause menu.

## Installation

1. Download it
2. Open your worlds datapack folder
3. Drag it in
4. leave and rejoin the world (if your in it)

(Note: you will have to agree to some warnings, thats Mojangs placement, not mine.)

## Q&A

Q: Is this legal?

A: Yes, as datapacks CANNOT be accessed only by client (unless playing singleplsyer)

Q: When are updates coming?

A: Whenever I release them.

Q: Do you plan on making actual minecraft mods?

A: No, as I dont feel like learning Java.

Q: Do you plan on making datapacks in the future?

A: Yes, I do actually.

Q: Can I help with development?

A: Yes, just contact me on Discord. (chipndip__)

Q: Will this be an actual client?

A: No, and it never will be.
